title: Bundle Executor Schema
description: Bundle JavaScript files using webpack with debug or production mode

entries.description: Bundle entry point paths relative to sourceDir

webpackConfigPath.description: Path to webpack.config.js relative to project root

sourceMap.description: Enable eval-source-map devtool in debug mode

applyLicenseHeaders.description: Optional post-step that prepends license headers to bundle output files

licenseTemplateFile.description: Path to custom license template file relative to project root

mode.description: Selects which bundled license template to use when licenseTemplateFile is omitted

eulaUrl.description: EULA URL for template variable <%= eula %>

version.description: Version string used in the banner (defaults to pkg.version)

commentType.description: Comment marker placed after /* in the banner opening

separator.description: Separator between banner and original file content

prependAfterLicense.description: Content prepended after the license banner (e.g. "\"use strict\";\n\n")

filenameMode.description: Filename token used in the banner template

includePatterns.description: Glob patterns of files within outDir to add headers to

excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns of files within outDir to skip
